title: Get Help - 211info
text: Use the guided category search or keyword search below to look up resources in PA 211’s database of service providers. Connect with the help you need, where you need it. If you need assistance, please dial 211 or text your zip code to 898-211 for free assistance from a resource specialist. Guided Search Crisis Hotlines Housing & Shelter Utility Assistance Parenting & Childcare Food Health Care Mental & Behavioral Health Legal & Public Safety Basic Needs Transportation Employment Foster Families Youth Services Education Volunteering & Donating Diverse Populations Disaster Services Financial Wellness Keyword Search - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name X You didn't add a location. Adding your location allows us to show resources near to you. Search All Add Location
